task_objective: Continue the frontend index decomposition by isolating auto-sync status BrowserView ownership from src/index.tsx.
tests_added: tests/test_frontend_static.py (updated to include the extracted status surface module and verify teardown through resetAutoSyncStatusSurface)
design_decisions: Moved BrowserView normalization, status HTML rendering, status publication, hide timers, completion mapping, and disposal into src/surfaces/autoSyncStatusSurface.tsx. Kept src/index.tsx as the lifecycle composition owner that calls publishAutoSyncStatus, hideAutoSyncStatus, completeAutoSyncStatus, and resetAutoSyncStatusSurface. Preserved the existing status strings, timeout values, BrowserView creation fallbacks, owner disposal behavior, and static characterization coverage.
results: Focused frontend static tests, TypeScript typecheck, Rollup build, ruff check, ruff format, ty check, and the full pytest suite passed.
